title: Asha
lede: A cognitive scaffold for Claude Code. Persistent identity, session memory, and domain-specific plugins for development, creative writing, research, and automation.

title: Thallus
lede: Decentralized AI agent infrastructure. Local-first, cryptographically signed, no central authority.

etymology.gloss: biology — the undifferentiated vegetative body of lichens and fungi

title: The Hush
lede: A cosmic horror novel in long-form revision. Reality stays mundane; the protagonist's experience of it does not.

etymology.gloss: the Matriarch's sedative current — a quiet that wants you not to struggle
